use_case: summarize legal contracts and flag risky clauses

gaps.name: summarize_contract
gaps.why: No library specialist produces a plain-language summary of a legal contract's key terms; needed to give the reader a concise overview before diving into risks.

gaps.name: flag_risky_clauses
gaps.why: No library specialist extracts and flags individual risky clauses from contract text with an explanation and per-clause severity; this is the core legal-review task.
